test_steps.expected: CyberArk deployed for all 25 prod DB servers
test_steps.actual: 23 servers have CyberArk, 2 legacy servers still using local accounts

test_steps.expected: ServiceNow integration for all access requests
test_steps.actual: Emergency access bypasses ServiceNow - uses manager email approval

cde_exceptions: 2 legacy DB servers not covered by PAM
Emergency access not integrated with ServiceNow
